message:
fix(config): SaveConfigValue preserves existing file contents

Replace viper.WriteConfigAs (which dumps all merged state including
defaults and env vars) with targeted YAML read-modify-write so only
the specified key is changed in config.yaml.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
